rulings.Case Title: LONNIE HILLMAN VS. CHARLES JACKSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 18, 2017, Line 2: DEFENDANT CHARLES JACKSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend based on CCP 430.10(e) and (f) for Plaintiff to allege in good faith: (1) as to the contract-based causes of action the terms of the contract, what term(s) were breached and when they were breached; (2) as to the quiet title cause of action to allege the date as to which determination is sought; (3) as to misrepresentation causes of action to allege "who, how, when, in what manner, etc." as to each affirmative and/or implied misrepresentation or to allege concealment. Plaintiff shall also allege the nature of misrepresentations. Currently allegations re: misrepresentations are factually inconsistent. See paragraphs 32 and 38 versus paragraph 39. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. Hearing Required to address why an OSC Re: Contempt should not be issued regarding Plaintiff's Counsel's failure to comply with CCP 430.41. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMY HO VS. ZHI BIN WU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 18, 2017, Line 3: DEFENDANTS ZHI WU and JUAN LI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith that Form 1007 was served on tenants along with the operative Notice and to attach a complete copy of the operative Notice to the Complaint including form 1007. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIMON ORTEGA VS. CRISTIAN TORRES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant [Ccp 1170.8, 2023.010, 2030.290, 2031.300, 2033.280(B) And (C)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 18, 2017, Line 4: PLAINTIFF SIMON ORTEGA'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant [Ccp 1170.8, 2023.010, 2030.290, 2031.300, 2033.280(B) And (C) GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Request for Production, Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories within 2 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions re deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,035. =(501/REQ)
